title: AMD’s Instinct MI455X: Aiming for the Sun
excerpt: Hello you fine Internet folks, here at AMD’s Advancing AI event we are looking at AMD’s brand new Instinct MI455X, replacing the older Instinct MI355X at the top of their AI stack.
content_html:
Hello you fine Internet folks, here at AMD’s Advancing AI event we are looking at AMD’s brand new Instinct MI455X, replacing the older Instinct MI355X at the top of their AI stack. It is AMD’s first GPU designed for rack-scale AI deployments and is based on the new CDNA5 architecture with major changes to the compute unit and SoC, including enhancements to compute performance, improved memory bandwidth, larger memory capacity, and packaged using TSMC’s CoWoS-L.

It comes along with the new Helios rackscale solution, enabling scaling to 72 GPUs in a single pod, up from 8 GPUs for previous MI355X systems. It also features a new fault-tolerant scale-up networking architecture based on UALink over Ethernet (UAEoL) with single-hop all-to-all communication across the entire rack.

A single MI455X contains 256 Work Group Processors (WGPs) across 8 Accelerator Complex Dies (XCDs), with a max “engine” clock of 2.4GHz. This enables peak compute figures ranging from 315 TFLOP for matrix/vector FP32 and vector FP16, and up to 40.26 PFLOP for OCP MXFP4. This is paired with 12 stacks of HBM4 each on a 2048 bit bus for a total of 192 channels, giving each GPU a total of 432 GB of memory at 23.3 TB/sec.

Starting with the changes in the “Compute Unit”, AMD now counts the WGPs instead of the CUs for CDNA5. Unlike what they have done on their consumer counterparts where each WGP counts as two CUs.

But just like RDNA4, each WGP comprises four dual issue Wave32 SIMD32 units alongside 4 scalar units which is a massive change from CDNA4’s four single issue Wave64 SIMD16 units.

This means that each WGP can do up to 256 packed FP32 operations per cycle (512 FLOPS if using FMA).

To support this new SIMD design, the VGPR register file has been reorganized with any wave now able to address up to 1,024 VGPRs which is four times the number of VGPRs that a wave could access in prior CDNA and RDNA architectures. Each SIMD still has 128kB of vector registers just like CDNA4 which means it has twice as many (1024) registers available in practice due to Wave32 vs Wave64, but it is still less than the 192kB available on RDNA4. It also means that a single wavefront is in some cases expected to occupy the entire SIMD.

The matrix units also have been beefed up with each matrix unit being able to do up to 8,192 FP4 operations per cycle and with 4 matrix units per WGP you can do up to 65,536 matrix operations per cycle per WGP.

This means that only FP4 and FP8 are practically faster in the new architecture, and the rest of the performance comes from increasing the SIMD width from 16 to 32.

The inter-WGP caches have also changed to support this new design. Both the L1 Data Cache and the LDS have doubled in size to 64 KB of L1 Data Cache and 320 KB for the LDS with the LDS bandwidth having doubled as well to better feed those CDNA5 WGPs. But this is mostly an artifact of AMD’s new accounting where we don’t split the WGP into two CUs.

Each XCD has 32 WGPs active, 34 physical WGPs of which 2 are fused off, which are broken up into 2 Shader Engines (SE) per XCD each with 16 WGPs. A shader engine is paired with a “Broadcast Arbitrator” replacing the L1 buffer (GL1) from RDNA4, which is now at the SE-level instead of the lower shader array-level. It works both as a write-combine buffer along with providing “up to 4x” bandwidth amplification by presumably broadcasting data.

The memory subsystem now allows multicast loads, accelerating matrix multiplication significantly by reducing redundant memory traffic. Imagine a GEMM that calculates C=A×B, then normally we would have each wavefront individually load a tile of, for example the A operand into the LDS of each WGP. With multicast loads we can instead load this tile of A into all relevant WGPs with a single multicast load instruction.

Each wavefront still loads a different B tile, but MI455X can fetch the common A data from L2 once and use the Broadcast Arbitrator to replicate it into all relevant WGPs private LDS allocations.

AMD calls this up to 4x bandwidth amplification, though the amplification happens after L2 and it does not quadruple L2 or HBM bandwidth. Instead, one unit of L2 traffic becomes four units of locally delivered data, reducing redundant cache reads and chiplet-link traffic while leaving each WGP with a nearby copy of the data.

Moving to the base dies, AMD now has a 192 MB Global L2 split between two Fabric Cache Dies (FCDs) each with 96 blocks of 1 MB of SRAM. Each of the FCDs can deliver up to 27 TB/s of L2 bandwidth to the 128 WGPs on that FCD for an aggregate bandwidth of up to 54 TB/s from the L2.

Those FCDs are attached to 12 stacks of HBM4 with each stack having 36 GB of DRAM for a total capacity of 432 GB of HBM4 while each stack is running at ~7.6 GT/s/pin connected over a 2,048b bus for a total memory bandwidth of 23.3 TB/s.

For any I/O that is external to a MI455X package, each FCD is attached to a IO die which does the very important job of connecting the GPU package to the host CPU, the scale-up network, and to the scale-out NICs. The CPU to GPU link that was previously serviced by PCIe has been replaced by a dedicated 16 lane AMD Infinity Fabric providing 256GB/s of bi-directional bandwidth which allows a coherent link between the GPU package and the host CPU.

Speaking of scaling up, along with the MI455X accelerator AMD is launching a validated rackscale platform for large scale AI infrastructure deployment. This is enabled by an increase in scale-up interfaces with MI455X having 36 x 400Gbit/s UALoE interfaces that implement 2 x 200G ethernet lanes each, comprising 3.6 TB/s of peak bidirectional bandwidth per GPU.

MI455X also introduces a split DMA architecture, which automatically associates traffic with the optimal link that reduces the topology awareness required for communication.

Helios uses OCP’s new Open Rack Wide form factor, compromising a cabinet 1.2m wide and 1.3m deep that provides. GPU’s are arranged in two groups of nine Compute Trays, each 1 OU in height. Each tray has four MI455X’s and one 96 core EPYC 9006 SP7. Each CPU is paired with 16 x 64GB DIMMS (for a total of 1TB of memory) and five E1.S slots for SSD’s. Six Helios Switch Trays provide a total of 12 switches connected directly via 3 UALoE links per GPU. Each switch provides 432 links at 200Gb/s, for an aggregate of 21.6TB/s per switch. This amounts to a scale-up bandwidth of 260TB/s bidirectionally.

Scale-out is provided via two boards that can contain either 4 or 6 Pensando NICs, depending on how much scale-out the end customer would like, providing up to 43TB/s of backend bandwidth. With 72 GPUs in one rack, a Helios deployment is able to provide up to 2.9 EF at MXFP4 or 22.6 PF at FP32, alongside 31TB of shared HBM4 at a combined 1.7PB/s of memory bandwidth.

The basic GCN microarchitecture underpinned every single one of AMD’s compute accelerators for nearly 15 years starting with Tahiti, followed by Fiji, Vega, and the first 4 generations of CDNA. With CDNA5 AMD has moved over to a microarchitecture that is based on the RDNA series putting a bookend to the long-lived line that was the GCN microarchitecture.

And with that bookend comes the start of a new story for AMD’s Datacenter Accelerators, one that now isn’t just about a single GPU but scaling to 72 GPUs in a rack along with scaling the number of racks. For that AMD is relying on nearly every part of their business from EPYC Server CPUs, to Pensando Networking, to the base GFX12 from the Radeon Division, to combine all of them into the AMD Helios Rack.

blocks.html_en: Hello you fine Internet folks, here at AMD’s Advancing AI event we are looking at AMD’s brand new Instinct MI455X, replacing the older Instinct MI355X at the top of their AI stack. It is AMD’s first GPU designed for rack-scale AI deployments and is based on the new CDNA5 architecture with major changes to the compute unit and SoC, including enhancements to compute performance, improved memory bandwidth, larger memory capacity, and packaged using TSMC’s CoWoS-L.

sentences.en: Hello you fine Internet folks, here at AMD’s Advancing AI event we are looking at AMD’s brand new Instinct MI455X, replacing the older Instinct MI355X at the top of their AI stack.
sentences.zh: 各位优秀的互联网人士，大家好，在 AMD 的 Advancing AI 活动中，我们正在关注 AMD 全新的 Instinct MI455X，它将取代其 AI 堆栈顶部旧的 Instinct MI355X。

sentences.en: It is AMD’s first GPU designed for rack-scale AI deployments and is based on the new CDNA5 architecture with major changes to the compute unit and SoC, including enhancements to compute performance, improved memory bandwidth, larger memory capacity, and packaged using TSMC’s CoWoS-L.
sentences.zh: 它是 AMD 首款专为机架级 AI 部署而设计的 GPU，基于新的 CDNA5 架构，对计算单元和 SoC 进行了重大更改，包括计算性能增强、内存带宽提高、内存容量更大，并使用台积电的 CoWoS-L 封装。

blocks.html_en: <figcaption>Instinct MI455X package</figcaption>

sentences.en: Instinct MI455X package
sentences.zh: 本能 MI455X 封装

blocks.html_en: It comes along with the new Helios rackscale solution, enabling scaling to 72 GPUs in a single pod, up from 8 GPUs for previous MI355X systems. It also features a new fault-tolerant scale-up networking architecture based on UALink over Ethernet (UAEoL) with single-hop all-to-all communication across the entire rack.

sentences.en: It comes along with the new Helios rackscale solution, enabling scaling to 72 GPUs in a single pod, up from 8 GPUs for previous MI355X systems.
sentences.zh: 它配备了新的 Helios 机架规模解决方案，可在单个 Pod 中扩展至 72 个 GPU，而之前的 MI355X 系统只有 8 个 GPU。

sentences.en: It also features a new fault-tolerant scale-up networking architecture based on UALink over Ethernet (UAEoL) with single-hop all-to-all communication across the entire rack.
sentences.zh: 它还具有基于以太网 UALink (UAEoL) 的新型容错扩展网络架构，可在整个机架上进行单跳全对全通信。

blocks.html_en: <figcaption>AMD Helios rack</figcaption>

sentences.en: AMD Helios rack
sentences.zh: AMD Helios 机架

blocks.html_en: A single MI455X contains 256 Work Group Processors (WGPs) across 8 Accelerator Complex Dies (XCDs), with a max “engine” clock of 2.4GHz. This enables peak compute figures ranging from 315 TFLOP for matrix/vector FP32 and vector FP16, and up to 40.26 PFLOP for OCP MXFP4. This is paired with 12 stacks of HBM4 each on a 2048 bit bus for a total of 192 channels, giving each GPU a total of 432 GB of memory at 23.3 TB/sec.

sentences.en: A single MI455X contains 256 Work Group Processors (WGPs) across 8 Accelerator Complex Dies (XCDs), with a max “engine” clock of 2.4GHz.
sentences.zh: 单个 MI455X 包含跨 8 个加速器复合芯片 (XCD) 的 256 个工作组处理器 (WGP)，最大“引擎”时钟为 2.4GHz。

sentences.en: This enables peak compute figures ranging from 315 TFLOP for matrix/vector FP32 and vector FP16, and up to 40.26 PFLOP for OCP MXFP4.
sentences.zh: 这使得峰值计算量范围从矩阵/矢量 FP32 和矢量 FP16 的 315 TFLOP 到 OCP MXFP4 的最高 40.26 PFLOP。

sentences.en: This is paired with 12 stacks of HBM4 each on a 2048 bit bus for a total of 192 channels, giving each GPU a total of 432 GB of memory at 23.3 TB/sec.
sentences.zh: 它与 12 个 HBM4 堆栈配对，每个堆栈位于 2048 位总线上，总共 192 个通道，为每个 GPU 提供总计 432 GB 的内存，速度为 23.3 TB/秒。

sentences.en: MI455X conceptual overview
sentences.zh: MI455X 概念概述

blocks.html_en: Starting with the changes in the “Compute Unit”, AMD now counts the WGPs instead of the CUs for CDNA5. Unlike what they have done on their consumer counterparts where each WGP counts as two CUs.

sentences.en: Starting with the changes in the “Compute Unit”, AMD now counts the WGPs instead of the CUs for CDNA5.
sentences.zh: 从“计算单元”的变化开始，AMD 现在计算 CDNA5 的 WGP 而不是 CU。

sentences.en: Unlike what they have done on their consumer counterparts where each WGP counts as two CUs.
sentences.zh: 与他们对消费者同行所做的不同，其中每个 WGP 算作两个 CU。

blocks.html_en: But just like RDNA4, each WGP comprises four dual issue Wave32 SIMD32 units alongside 4 scalar units which is a massive change from CDNA4’s four single issue Wave64 SIMD16 units.

sentences.en: But just like RDNA4, each WGP comprises four dual issue Wave32 SIMD32 units alongside 4 scalar units which is a massive change from CDNA4’s four single issue Wave64 SIMD16 units.
sentences.zh: 但就像 RDNA4 一样，每个 WGP 都包含四个双发 Wave32 SIMD32 单元和 4 个标量单元，这与 CDNA4 的四个单发 Wave64 SIMD16 单元相比发生了巨大变化。

blocks.html_en: This means that each WGP can do up to 256 packed FP32 operations per cycle (512 FLOPS if using FMA).

sentences.en: This means that each WGP can do up to 256 packed FP32 operations per cycle (512 FLOPS if using FMA).
sentences.zh: 这意味着每个 WGP 每个周期最多可以执行 256 次打包 FP32 操作（如果使用 FMA，则为 512 FLOPS）。

blocks.html_en: To support this new SIMD design, the VGPR register file has been reorganized with any wave now able to address up to 1,024 VGPRs which is four times the number of VGPRs that a wave could access in prior CDNA and RDNA architectures. Each SIMD still has 128kB of vector registers just like CDNA4 which means it has twice as many (1024) registers available in practice due to Wave32 vs Wave64, but it is still less than the 192kB available on RDNA4. It also means that a single wavefront is in some cases expected to occupy the entire SIMD.

sentences.en: To support this new SIMD design, the VGPR register file has been reorganized with any wave now able to address up to 1,024 VGPRs which is four times the number of VGPRs that a wave could access in prior CDNA and RDNA architectures.
sentences.zh: 为了支持这种新的 SIMD 设计，VGPR 寄存器文件已经过重新组织，现在任何 Wave 都能够寻址多达 1,024 个 VGPR，这是先前 CDNA 和 RDNA 架构中一个 Wave 可以访问的 VGPR 数量的四倍。

sentences.en: Each SIMD still has 128kB of vector registers just like CDNA4 which means it has twice as many (1024) registers available in practice due to Wave32 vs Wave64, but it is still less than the 192kB available on RDNA4.
sentences.zh: 每个 SIMD 仍具有 128kB 向量寄存器，就像 CDNA4 一样，这意味着由于 Wave32 与 Wave64 相比，它在实践中可用的寄存器数量是 Wave32 的两倍 (1024)，但仍小于 RDNA4 上可用的 192kB。

sentences.en: It also means that a single wavefront is in some cases expected to occupy the entire SIMD.
sentences.zh: 这还意味着在某些情况下单个波前预计会占据整个 SIMD。

blocks.html_en: The matrix units also have been beefed up with each matrix unit being able to do up to 8,192 FP4 operations per cycle and with 4 matrix units per WGP you can do up to 65,536 matrix operations per cycle per WGP.

sentences.en: The matrix units also have been beefed up with each matrix unit being able to do up to 8,192 FP4 operations per cycle and with 4 matrix units per WGP you can do up to 65,536 matrix operations per cycle per WGP.
sentences.zh: 矩阵单元也得到了增强，每个矩阵单元每个周期最多可以执行 8,192 次 FP4 运算，每个 WGP 有 4 个矩阵单元，每个 WGP 每个周期最多可以执行 65,536 次矩阵运算。

blocks.html_en: This means that only FP4 and FP8 are practically faster in the new architecture, and the rest of the performance comes from increasing the SIMD width from 16 to 32.

sentences.en: This means that only FP4 and FP8 are practically faster in the new architecture, and the rest of the performance comes from increasing the SIMD width from 16 to 32.
sentences.zh: 这意味着在新架构中只有 FP4 和 FP8 实际上更快，其余性能来自将 SIMD 宽度从 16 增加到 32。

sentences.en: Instinct MI455X memory subsystem hierarchy
sentences.zh: Instinct MI455X 内存子系统层次结构

Both the L1 Data Cache and the LDS have doubled in size to 64 KB of L1 Data Cache and 320 KB for the LDS with the LDS bandwidth having doubled as well to better feed those CDNA5 WGPs. But this is mostly an artifact of AMD’s new accounting where we don’t split the WGP into two CUs.

sentences.en: The inter-WGP caches have also changed to support this new design.
sentences.zh: WGP 间缓存也发生了变化以支持这种新设计。

sentences.en: Both the L1 Data Cache and the LDS have doubled in size to 64 KB of L1 Data Cache and 320 KB for the LDS with the LDS bandwidth having doubled as well to better feed those CDNA5 WGPs.
sentences.zh: L1 数据缓存和 LDS 的大小都增加了一倍，L1 数据缓存为 64 KB，LDS 为 320 KB，LDS 带宽也增加了一倍，以更好地满足这些 CDNA5 WGP 的需求。

sentences.en: But this is mostly an artifact of AMD’s new accounting where we don’t split the WGP into two CUs.
sentences.zh: 但这主要是 AMD 新会计的产物，我们没有将 WGP 分成两个 CU。

blocks.html_en: Each XCD has 32 WGPs active, 34 physical WGPs of which 2 are fused off, which are broken up into 2 Shader Engines (SE) per XCD each with 16 WGPs. A shader engine is paired with a “Broadcast Arbitrator” replacing the L1 buffer (GL1) from RDNA4, which is now at the SE-level instead of the lower shader array-level. It works both as a write-combine buffer along with providing “up to 4x” bandwidth amplification by presumably broadcasting data.

sentences.en: Each XCD has 32 WGPs active, 34 physical WGPs of which 2 are fused off, which are broken up into 2 Shader Engines (SE) per XCD each with 16 WGPs.
sentences.zh: 每个 XCD 有 32 个活动 WGP，34 个物理 WGP，其中 2 个被融合，每个 XCD 分为 2 个着色器引擎 (SE)，每个引擎有 16 个 WGP。

sentences.en: A shader engine is paired with a “Broadcast Arbitrator” replacing the L1 buffer (GL1) from RDNA4, which is now at the SE-level instead of the lower shader array-level.
sentences.zh: 着色器引擎与“广播仲裁器”配对，取代了 RDNA4 中的 L1 缓冲区 (GL1)，RDNA4 现在处于 SE 级别，而不是较低的着色器阵列级别。

sentences.en: It works both as a write-combine buffer along with providing “up to 4x” bandwidth amplification by presumably broadcasting data.
sentences.zh: 它既可以用作写入组合缓冲区，也可以通过广播数据提供“高达 4 倍”的带宽放大。

blocks.html_en: The memory subsystem now allows multicast loads, accelerating matrix multiplication significantly by reducing redundant memory traffic. Imagine a GEMM that calculates C=A×B, then normally we would have each wavefront individually load a tile of, for example the A operand into the LDS of each WGP. With multicast loads we can instead load this tile of A into all relevant WGPs with a single multicast load instruction.

sentences.en: The memory subsystem now allows multicast loads, accelerating matrix multiplication significantly by reducing redundant memory traffic.
sentences.zh: 内存子系统现在允许多播加载，通过减少冗余内存流量来显着加速矩阵乘法。

sentences.en: Imagine a GEMM that calculates C=A×B, then normally we would have each wavefront individually load a tile of, for example the A operand into the LDS of each WGP.
sentences.zh: 想象一个计算 C=A×B 的 GEMM，那么通常我们会让每个波前单独加载一个图块，例如将 A 操作数加载到每个 WGP 的 LDS 中。

sentences.en: With multicast loads we can instead load this tile of A into all relevant WGPs with a single multicast load instruction.
sentences.zh: 通过多播加载，我们可以使用单个多播加载指令将 A 的这个图块加载到所有相关的 WGP 中。

blocks.html_en: Each wavefront still loads a different B tile, but MI455X can fetch the common A data from L2 once and use the Broadcast Arbitrator to replicate it into all relevant WGPs private LDS allocations.

sentences.en: Each wavefront still loads a different B tile, but MI455X can fetch the common A data from L2 once and use the Broadcast Arbitrator to replicate it into all relevant WGPs private LDS allocations.
sentences.zh: 每个波前仍然加载不同的 B 图块，但 MI455X 可以从 L2 获取一次公共 A 数据，并使用广播仲裁器将其复制到所有相关的 WGP 私有 LDS 分配中。

blocks.html_en: AMD calls this up to 4x bandwidth amplification, though the amplification happens after L2 and it does not quadruple L2 or HBM bandwidth. Instead, one unit of L2 traffic becomes four units of locally delivered data, reducing redundant cache reads and chiplet-link traffic while leaving each WGP with a nearby copy of the data.

sentences.en: AMD calls this up to 4x bandwidth amplification, though the amplification happens after L2 and it does not quadruple L2 or HBM bandwidth.
sentences.zh: AMD 将其称为 4 倍带宽放大，尽管放大发生在 L2 之后，并且不会使 L2 或 HBM 带宽增加四倍。

sentences.en: Instead, one unit of L2 traffic becomes four units of locally delivered data, reducing redundant cache reads and chiplet-link traffic while leaving each WGP with a nearby copy of the data.
sentences.zh: 相反，一个 L2 流量单元变成了四个本地交付数据单元，减少了冗余缓存读取和小芯片链路流量，同时为每个 WGP 留下了附近的数据副本。

blocks.html_en: Moving to the base dies, AMD now has a 192 MB Global L2 split between two Fabric Cache Dies (FCDs) each with 96 blocks of 1 MB of SRAM. Each of the FCDs can deliver up to 27 TB/s of L2 bandwidth to the 128 WGPs on that FCD for an aggregate bandwidth of up to 54 TB/s from the L2.

sentences.en: Moving to the base dies, AMD now has a 192 MB Global L2 split between two Fabric Cache Dies (FCDs) each with 96 blocks of 1 MB of SRAM.
sentences.zh: 转向基础芯片，AMD 现在在两个结构高速缓存芯片 (FCD) 之间分配了 192 MB 全局 L2，每个芯片具有 96 个 1 MB SRAM 块。

sentences.en: Each of the FCDs can deliver up to 27 TB/s of L2 bandwidth to the 128 WGPs on that FCD for an aggregate bandwidth of up to 54 TB/s from the L2.
sentences.zh: 每个 FCD 均可向该 FCD 上的 128 个 WGP 提供高达 27 TB/s 的 L2 带宽，从而使 L2 的聚合带宽高达 54 TB/s。

blocks.html_en: Those FCDs are attached to 12 stacks of HBM4 with each stack having 36 GB of DRAM for a total capacity of 432 GB of HBM4 while each stack is running at ~7.6 GT/s/pin connected over a 2,048b bus for a total memory bandwidth of 23.3 TB/s.

sentences.en: Those FCDs are attached to 12 stacks of HBM4 with each stack having 36 GB of DRAM for a total capacity of 432 GB of HBM4 while each stack is running at ~7.6 GT/s/pin connected over a 2,048b bus for a total memory bandwidth of 23.3 TB/s.
sentences.zh: 这些 FCD 连接到 12 个 HBM4 堆栈，每个堆栈具有 36 GB DRAM，HBM4 的总容量为 432 GB，而每个堆栈以约 7.6 GT/s/引脚运行，通过 2,048b 总线连接，总内存带宽为 23.3 TB/s。

blocks.html_en: For any I/O that is external to a MI455X package, each FCD is attached to a IO die which does the very important job of connecting the GPU package to the host CPU, the scale-up network, and to the scale-out NICs. The CPU to GPU link that was previously serviced by PCIe has been replaced by a dedicated 16 lane AMD Infinity Fabric providing 256GB/s of bi-directional bandwidth which allows a coherent link between the GPU package and the host CPU.

sentences.en: For any I/O that is external to a MI455X package, each FCD is attached to a IO die which does the very important job of connecting the GPU package to the host CPU, the scale-up network, and to the scale-out NICs.
sentences.zh: 对于 MI455X 封装外部的任何 I/O，每个 FCD 都连接到一个 IO 芯片，该芯片负责将 GPU 封装连接到主机 CPU、纵向扩展网络和横向扩展 NIC。

sentences.en: The CPU to GPU link that was previously serviced by PCIe has been replaced by a dedicated 16 lane AMD Infinity Fabric providing 256GB/s of bi-directional bandwidth which allows a coherent link between the GPU package and the host CPU.
sentences.zh: 以前由 PCIe 提供服务的 CPU 到 GPU 链路已被专用 16 通道 AMD Infinity Fabric 取代，提供 256GB/s 的双向带宽，从而实现 GPU 封装和主机 CPU 之间的连贯链路。

blocks.html_en: Speaking of scaling up, along with the MI455X accelerator AMD is launching a validated rackscale platform for large scale AI infrastructure deployment. This is enabled by an increase in scale-up interfaces with MI455X having 36 x 400Gbit/s UALoE interfaces that implement 2 x 200G ethernet lanes each, comprising 3.6 TB/s of peak bidirectional bandwidth per GPU.

sentences.en: Speaking of scaling up, along with the MI455X accelerator AMD is launching a validated rackscale platform for large scale AI infrastructure deployment.
sentences.zh: 说到扩展，AMD 正在与 MI455X 加速器一起推出经过验证的机架规模平台，用于大规模 AI 基础设施部署。

sentences.en: This is enabled by an increase in scale-up interfaces with MI455X having 36 x 400Gbit/s UALoE interfaces that implement 2 x 200G ethernet lanes each, comprising 3.6 TB/s of peak bidirectional bandwidth per GPU.
sentences.zh: 这是通过增加扩展接口来实现的，MI455X 具有 36 个 400Gbit/s UALoE 接口，每个接口实现 2 个 200G 以太网通道，每个 GPU 包括 3.6 TB/s 的峰值双向带宽。

blocks.html_en: MI455X also introduces a split DMA architecture, which automatically associates traffic with the optimal link that reduces the topology awareness required for communication.

sentences.en: MI455X also introduces a split DMA architecture, which automatically associates traffic with the optimal link that reduces the topology awareness required for communication.
sentences.zh: MI455X还引入了分离式DMA架构，可自动将流量与最佳链路关联起来，从而减少通信所需的拓扑感知。

blocks.html_en: Helios uses OCP’s new Open Rack Wide form factor, compromising a cabinet 1.2m wide and 1.3m deep that provides. GPU’s are arranged in two groups of nine Compute Trays, each 1 OU in height. Each tray has four MI455X’s and one 96 core EPYC 9006 SP7. Each CPU is paired with 16 x 64GB DIMMS (for a total of 1TB of memory) and five E1.S slots for SSD’s. Six Helios Switch Trays provide a total of 12 switches connected directly via 3 UALoE links per GPU. Each switch provides 432 links at 200Gb/s, for an aggregate of 21.6TB/s per switch. This amounts to a scale-up bandwidth of 260TB/s bidirectionally.

sentences.en: Helios uses OCP’s new Open Rack Wide form factor, compromising a cabinet 1.2m wide and 1.3m deep that provides.
sentences.zh: Helios 使用 OCP 的新型 Open Rack Wide 外形尺寸，并采用 1.2m 宽和 1.3m 深的机柜。

sentences.en: GPU’s are arranged in two groups of nine Compute Trays, each 1 OU in height.
sentences.zh: GPU 排列在两组，每组 9 个计算托盘，每组高度为 1 OU。

sentences.en: Each tray has four MI455X’s and one 96 core EPYC 9006 SP7.
sentences.zh: 每个托盘有四个 MI455X 和一个 96 核 EPYC 9006 SP7。

sentences.en: Each CPU is paired with 16 x 64GB DIMMS (for a total of 1TB of memory) and five E1.S slots for SSD’s.
sentences.zh: 每个 CPU 都配有 16 个 64GB DIMM（总共 1TB 内存）和五个用于 SSD 的 E1.S 插槽。

sentences.en: Six Helios Switch Trays provide a total of 12 switches connected directly via 3 UALoE links per GPU.
sentences.zh: 六个 Helios 交换机托盘提供总共 12 个交换机，每个 GPU 通过 3 个 UALoE 链路直接连接。

sentences.en: Each switch provides 432 links at 200Gb/s, for an aggregate of 21.6TB/s per switch.
sentences.zh: 每台交换机以 200Gb/s 的速度提供 432 个链路，每台交换机的总吞吐量为 21.6TB/s。

sentences.en: This amounts to a scale-up bandwidth of 260TB/s bidirectionally.
sentences.zh: 这相当于双向扩展带宽达 260TB/s。

blocks.html_en: Scale-out is provided via two boards that can contain either 4 or 6 Pensando NICs, depending on how much scale-out the end customer would like, providing up to 43TB/s of backend bandwidth. With 72 GPUs in one rack, a Helios deployment is able to provide up to 2.9 EF at MXFP4 or 22.6 PF at FP32, alongside 31TB of shared HBM4 at a combined 1.7PB/s of memory bandwidth.

sentences.en: Scale-out is provided via two boards that can contain either 4 or 6 Pensando NICs, depending on how much scale-out the end customer would like, providing up to 43TB/s of backend bandwidth.
sentences.zh: 通过两个可包含 4 或 6 个 Pensando NIC 的板提供横向扩展，具体取决于最终客户想要的横向扩展程度，提供高达 43TB/s 的后端带宽。

sentences.en: With 72 GPUs in one rack, a Helios deployment is able to provide up to 2.9 EF at MXFP4 or 22.6 PF at FP32, alongside 31TB of shared HBM4 at a combined 1.7PB/s of memory bandwidth.
sentences.zh: 由于一个机架中有 72 个 GPU，Helios 部署能够在 MXFP4 上提供高达 2.9 EF 或在 FP32 上提供高达 22.6 PF，以及 31TB 共享 HBM4，总内存带宽为 1.7PB/s。

blocks.html_en: The basic GCN microarchitecture underpinned every single one of AMD’s compute accelerators for nearly 15 years starting with Tahiti, followed by Fiji, Vega, and the first 4 generations of CDNA. With CDNA5 AMD has moved over to a microarchitecture that is based on the RDNA series putting a bookend to the long-lived line that was the GCN microarchitecture.

sentences.en: The basic GCN microarchitecture underpinned every single one of AMD’s compute accelerators for nearly 15 years starting with Tahiti, followed by Fiji, Vega, and the first 4 generations of CDNA.
sentences.zh: 近 15 年来，基本的 GCN 微架构支撑着 AMD 的每一款计算加速器，从 Tahiti 开始，随后是 Fiji、Vega 和前 4 代 CDNA。

sentences.en: With CDNA5 AMD has moved over to a microarchitecture that is based on the RDNA series putting a bookend to the long-lived line that was the GCN microarchitecture.
sentences.zh: 通过 CDNA5，AMD 已经转向基于 RDNA 系列的微架构，为 GCN 微架构这一长期存在的产品线划上了句号。

blocks.html_en: And with that bookend comes the start of a new story for AMD’s Datacenter Accelerators, one that now isn’t just about a single GPU but scaling to 72 GPUs in a rack along with scaling the number of racks. For that AMD is relying on nearly every part of their business from EPYC Server CPUs, to Pensando Networking, to the base GFX12 from the Radeon Division, to combine all of them into the AMD Helios Rack.

sentences.en: And with that bookend comes the start of a new story for AMD’s Datacenter Accelerators, one that now isn’t just about a single GPU but scaling to 72 GPUs in a rack along with scaling the number of racks.
sentences.zh: 随着这一书挡的到来，AMD 数据中心加速器的新故事开始了，现在它不仅仅是一个 GPU，而是在机架中扩展至 72 个 GPU，同时扩展了机架数量。

sentences.en: For that AMD is relying on nearly every part of their business from EPYC Server CPUs, to Pensando Networking, to the base GFX12 from the Radeon Division, to combine all of them into the AMD Helios Rack.
sentences.zh: 为此，AMD 几乎依赖其业务的每一个部分，从 EPYC 服务器 CPU 到 Pensando Networking，再到 Radeon 部门的基础 GFX12，将所有这些都整合到 AMD Helios Rack 中。

content_html_zh:
各位优秀的互联网人士，大家好，在 AMD 的 Advancing AI 活动中，我们正在关注 AMD 全新的 Instinct MI455X，它将取代其 AI 堆栈顶部旧的 Instinct MI355X。 它是 AMD 首款专为机架级 AI 部署而设计的 GPU，基于新的 CDNA5 架构，对计算单元和 SoC 进行了重大更改，包括计算性能增强、内存带宽提高、内存容量更大，并使用台积电的 CoWoS-L 封装。

它配备了新的 Helios 机架规模解决方案，可在单个 Pod 中扩展至 72 个 GPU，而之前的 MI355X 系统只有 8 个 GPU。 它还具有基于以太网 UALink (UAEoL) 的新型容错扩展网络架构，可在整个机架上进行单跳全对全通信。

单个 MI455X 包含跨 8 个加速器复合芯片 (XCD) 的 256 个工作组处理器 (WGP)，最大“引擎”时钟为 2.4GHz。 这使得峰值计算量范围从矩阵/矢量 FP32 和矢量 FP16 的 315 TFLOP 到 OCP MXFP4 的最高 40.26 PFLOP。 它与 12 个 HBM4 堆栈配对，每个堆栈位于 2048 位总线上，总共 192 个通道，为每个 GPU 提供总计 432 GB 的内存，速度为 23.3 TB/秒。

从“计算单元”的变化开始，AMD 现在计算 CDNA5 的 WGP 而不是 CU。 与他们对消费者同行所做的不同，其中每个 WGP 算作两个 CU。

但就像 RDNA4 一样，每个 WGP 都包含四个双发 Wave32 SIMD32 单元和 4 个标量单元，这与 CDNA4 的四个单发 Wave64 SIMD16 单元相比发生了巨大变化。

这意味着每个 WGP 每个周期最多可以执行 256 次打包 FP32 操作（如果使用 FMA，则为 512 FLOPS）。

为了支持这种新的 SIMD 设计，VGPR 寄存器文件已经过重新组织，现在任何 Wave 都能够寻址多达 1,024 个 VGPR，这是先前 CDNA 和 RDNA 架构中一个 Wave 可以访问的 VGPR 数量的四倍。 每个 SIMD 仍具有 128kB 向量寄存器，就像 CDNA4 一样，这意味着由于 Wave32 与 Wave64 相比，它在实践中可用的寄存器数量是 Wave32 的两倍 (1024)，但仍小于 RDNA4 上可用的 192kB。 这还意味着在某些情况下单个波前预计会占据整个 SIMD。

矩阵单元也得到了增强，每个矩阵单元每个周期最多可以执行 8,192 次 FP4 运算，每个 WGP 有 4 个矩阵单元，每个 WGP 每个周期最多可以执行 65,536 次矩阵运算。

这意味着在新架构中只有 FP4 和 FP8 实际上更快，其余性能来自将 SIMD 宽度从 16 增加到 32。

WGP 间缓存也发生了变化以支持这种新设计。 L1 数据缓存和 LDS 的大小都增加了一倍，L1 数据缓存为 64 KB，LDS 为 320 KB，LDS 带宽也增加了一倍，以更好地满足这些 CDNA5 WGP 的需求。 但这主要是 AMD 新会计的产物，我们没有将 WGP 分成两个 CU。

每个 XCD 有 32 个活动 WGP，34 个物理 WGP，其中 2 个被融合，每个 XCD 分为 2 个着色器引擎 (SE)，每个引擎有 16 个 WGP。 着色器引擎与“广播仲裁器”配对，取代了 RDNA4 中的 L1 缓冲区 (GL1)，RDNA4 现在处于 SE 级别，而不是较低的着色器阵列级别。 它既可以用作写入组合缓冲区，也可以通过广播数据提供“高达 4 倍”的带宽放大。

内存子系统现在允许多播加载，通过减少冗余内存流量来显着加速矩阵乘法。 想象一个计算 C=A×B 的 GEMM，那么通常我们会让每个波前单独加载一个图块，例如将 A 操作数加载到每个 WGP 的 LDS 中。 通过多播加载，我们可以使用单个多播加载指令将 A 的这个图块加载到所有相关的 WGP 中。

每个波前仍然加载不同的 B 图块，但 MI455X 可以从 L2 获取一次公共 A 数据，并使用广播仲裁器将其复制到所有相关的 WGP 私有 LDS 分配中。

AMD 将其称为 4 倍带宽放大，尽管放大发生在 L2 之后，并且不会使 L2 或 HBM 带宽增加四倍。 相反，一个 L2 流量单元变成了四个本地交付数据单元，减少了冗余缓存读取和小芯片链路流量，同时为每个 WGP 留下了附近的数据副本。

转向基础芯片，AMD 现在在两个结构高速缓存芯片 (FCD) 之间分配了 192 MB 全局 L2，每个芯片具有 96 个 1 MB SRAM 块。 每个 FCD 均可向该 FCD 上的 128 个 WGP 提供高达 27 TB/s 的 L2 带宽，从而使 L2 的聚合带宽高达 54 TB/s。

这些 FCD 连接到 12 个 HBM4 堆栈，每个堆栈具有 36 GB DRAM，HBM4 的总容量为 432 GB，而每个堆栈以约 7.6 GT/s/引脚运行，通过 2,048b 总线连接，总内存带宽为 23.3 TB/s。

对于 MI455X 封装外部的任何 I/O，每个 FCD 都连接到一个 IO 芯片，该芯片负责将 GPU 封装连接到主机 CPU、纵向扩展网络和横向扩展 NIC。 以前由 PCIe 提供服务的 CPU 到 GPU 链路已被专用 16 通道 AMD Infinity Fabric 取代，提供 256GB/s 的双向带宽，从而实现 GPU 封装和主机 CPU 之间的连贯链路。

说到扩展，AMD 正在与 MI455X 加速器一起推出经过验证的机架规模平台，用于大规模 AI 基础设施部署。 这是通过增加扩展接口来实现的，MI455X 具有 36 个 400Gbit/s UALoE 接口，每个接口实现 2 个 200G 以太网通道，每个 GPU 包括 3.6 TB/s 的峰值双向带宽。

MI455X还引入了分离式DMA架构，可自动将流量与最佳链路关联起来，从而减少通信所需的拓扑感知。

Helios 使用 OCP 的新型 Open Rack Wide 外形尺寸，并采用 1.2m 宽和 1.3m 深的机柜。 GPU 排列在两组，每组 9 个计算托盘，每组高度为 1 OU。 每个托盘有四个 MI455X 和一个 96 核 EPYC 9006 SP7。 每个 CPU 都配有 16 个 64GB DIMM（总共 1TB 内存）和五个用于 SSD 的 E1.S 插槽。 六个 Helios 交换机托盘提供总共 12 个交换机，每个 GPU 通过 3 个 UALoE 链路直接连接。 每台交换机以 200Gb/s 的速度提供 432 个链路，每台交换机的总吞吐量为 21.6TB/s。 这相当于双向扩展带宽达 260TB/s。

通过两个可包含 4 或 6 个 Pensando NIC 的板提供横向扩展，具体取决于最终客户想要的横向扩展程度，提供高达 43TB/s 的后端带宽。 由于一个机架中有 72 个 GPU，Helios 部署能够在 MXFP4 上提供高达 2.9 EF 或在 FP32 上提供高达 22.6 PF，以及 31TB 共享 HBM4，总内存带宽为 1.7PB/s。

近 15 年来，基本的 GCN 微架构支撑着 AMD 的每一款计算加速器，从 Tahiti 开始，随后是 Fiji、Vega 和前 4 代 CDNA。 通过 CDNA5，AMD 已经转向基于 RDNA 系列的微架构，为 GCN 微架构这一长期存在的产品线划上了句号。

随着这一书挡的到来，AMD 数据中心加速器的新故事开始了，现在它不仅仅是一个 GPU，而是在机架中扩展至 72 个 GPU，同时扩展了机架数量。 为此，AMD 几乎依赖其业务的每一个部分，从 EPYC 服务器 CPU 到 Pensando Networking，再到 Radeon 部门的基础 GFX12，将所有这些都整合到 AMD Helios Rack 中。
